title: string functions return incorrectly when processing `blob` type with `like` statements
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```
create table lrr_test(`COL1` mediumblob DEFAULT NULL);
insert into lrr_test values(0xFF),(0x7F),(0xF9),(0xFA);
select col1, lcase(col1) from lrr_test where lcase(col1) not like lcase(0xFF);
```
Apart from `lcase`, these functions are also incorrect: `substring_index`, `lower`, `upper`,` rpad`, `lpad`, `left`, `to_base64`, `ucase`, `repeat`

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
+------------+--------------------------+
| col1       | lcase(col1)              |
+------------+--------------------------+
| 0x7F       | 0x7F                     |
| 0xF9       | 0xF9                     |
| 0xFA       | 0xFA                     |
+------------+--------------------------+

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
+------------+--------------------------+
| col1       | lcase(col1)              |
+------------+--------------------------+
| 0x7F       | 0x7F                     |
+------------+--------------------------+

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v7.5.5
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 85c160d464f392e811e432112f168064e53bff66
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2024-12-13 10:02:48
GoVersion: go1.21.13
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_blob(`COL1` mediumblob DEFAULT NULL, `COL2` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT COL1, LOWER(COL1) FROM test_blob WHERE LOWER(COL1) NOT LIKE LOWER(0xFF);
SELECT COL1, LOWER(COL1) FROM test_blob WHERE COL2 IS NULL;
SELECT COL1 FROM test_blob WHERE LOWER(COL1) LIKE LOWER(CONVERT(0x7F USING utf8));
key_bug_features: string functions fail with blob type and like statements
